children.text: the current and foreseeable trends in the levels of employment, unemployment, production, capital formation, real income, Federal budget outlays and receipts, productivity, international trade and payments, and prices, and a review and analysis of recent domestic and international developments affecting economic trends in the Nation;

children.label: A
children.text: annual numerical goals for employment and unemployment, production, real income, productivity, Federal outlays as a proportion of gross national product, and prices for the calendar year in which the Economic Report is transmitted and for the following calendar year, designated as short-term goals, which shall be consistent with achieving as rapidly as feasible the goals of full employment and production, increased real income, balanced growth, fiscal policies that would establish the share of an expanding gross national product accounted for by Federal outlays at the lowest level consistent with national needs and priorities, a balanced Federal budget, adequate productivity growth, price stability, achievement of an improved trade balance, and proper attention to national priorities; and

children.label: B
children.text: annual numerical goals as specified in subparagraph (A) for the three successive calendar years, designated as medium term goals;
employment objectives for certain significant subgroups of the labor force, including youth, women, minorities, handicapped persons, veterans, and middle-aged and older persons; and
a program for carrying out the policy declared in , together with such recommendations for legislation as the President may deem necessary or desirable.section 1021 of this title

children.heading: Supplementary reports
children.label: b Supplementary reports
children.text: The President may transmit from time to time to the Congress reports supplementary to the Economic Report, each of which shall include such supplementary or revised recommendations as he may deem necessary or desirable to achieve the policy declared in .section 1021 of this title

children.heading: Referral to joint committee
children.label: c Referral to joint committee
children.text: The Economic Report, and all supplementary reports transmitted under subsection (b), shall, when transmitted to Congress, be referred to the joint committee created by .section 1024 of this title

children.heading: Rate of unemployment
children.label: d Rate of unemployment
children.text: For the purposes of the Full Employment and Balanced Growth Act of 1978 [ et seq.] the percentage rate of unemployment as a percentage of the civilian labor force as set forth by the Bureau of Labor Statistics in the Department of Labor as computed under the procedures in effect as of .15 U.S.C. 31011So in original. Probably should be “is”.1October 27, 1978

children.heading: “Inflation”; “prices”; “reasonable price stability” defined
children.label: e “Inflation”; “prices”; “reasonable price stability” defined
children.text: For the purpose of the Full Employment and Balanced Growth Act of 1978 [ et seq.], the terms “inflation”, “prices”, and “reasonable price stability” refer to the rate of change or level of the consumer price index as set forth by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, United States Department of Labor.15 U.S.C. 3101
